requirements.task_name: Book an afternoon family museum visit on a specific Saturday in May
requirements.task_description: Reserve general admission tickets for 2 adults and 1 child on Saturday, May 16, 2026, at or after 3:00 pm, and reach the visit summary page showing that booking.

required_variables.set_condition: After building the items list, if there exists at least one cart item whose admission_booking meets all of: (a) booking.visit_date (substring 0–10) === '2026-05-16'; (b) associated ticket_type.name === 'General Museum Entry'; (c) booking.start_time >= '15:00'; (d) booking.adult_count === 2; (e) booking.child_6_12_count === 1; (f) booking.child_count === 0; (g) booking.senior_count === 0.
required_variables.reason: Indicate that the visit summary/cart page was actually viewed while a booking matching the task criteria was present.

required_variables.set_condition: At the same time as task1_visitSummaryViewed is set to true (i.e., when a qualifying admission_booking is found in the cart items). If multiple qualify, prefer the first matching booking in the items array.
required_variables.reason: Give the evaluator a concrete booking identifier to tie the summary view to a specific booking for deeper correctness checks (time-slot earliest-after-15:00 can then be verified against admission_timeslots).

required_variables.set_condition: At the same time as task1_visitSummaryViewed is set to true, using the same qualifying admission_booking.
required_variables.reason: Allows the evaluator to cross-check that the chosen time slot is the earliest available starting at or after 15:00 on 2026-05-16 using admission_timeslots, without embedding that logic in the SDK.

requirements.task_name: Create a 4-stop self-guided tour of pre-1500 European cheese exhibits under 90 minutes total
requirements.task_description: Use exhibit filters to find pre-1500 European exhibits, add 4 qualifying exhibits from 4 countries (≤25 min each) to a route, and configure the route.

required_variables.set_condition: Whenever listExhibits is called with filters.region === 'europe', filters.era_value === 'before_1500', filters.max_estimated_visit_time_minutes != null && filters.max_estimated_visit_time_minutes <= 25, and sort_by === 'visit_time_asc'.
required_variables.value_to_set: { region: filters.region, era_value: filters.era_value, max_estimated_visit_time_minutes: filters.max_estimated_visit_time_minutes, sort_by: sort_by }
required_variables.reason: Capture that the user actually used the correct exhibit filters and sort order required by the task, which cannot be reconstructed from route_stops alone.

required_variables.set_condition: Whenever getRouteOverview is called (after the schedule is computed).
required_variables.reason: Indicate that the user opened the self-guided route overview ("My Route") page. The evaluator can then verify that, at some point, a 4-stop qualifying route existed with total duration ≤90 minutes and start_time configured to 10:00 using self_guided_routes and route_stops.

requirements.task_name: Choose the longest English guided tour under €25 on a specific date and start booking
requirements.task_description: Filter guided tours on 2026-08-10 in English with max price €25, sort by duration high-to-low, choose the first tour, and proceed to the booking details page for 1 adult.

required_variables.set_condition: Whenever listGuidedTours is called with filters.date === '2026-08-10', filters.language === 'english', filters.max_price != null && filters.max_price <= 25, and sort_by === 'duration_desc'.
required_variables.value_to_set: { date: filters.date, language: filters.language, max_price: filters.max_price, sort_by: sort_by }
required_variables.reason: Record that the tour list was filtered to the correct date, language, and max price, with duration sorted from longest to shortest. The evaluator can then verify that the final booked program_booking corresponds to the first item under this filter set.

required_variables.set_condition: After resolving booking, program, and session, if booking exists and program.program_type === 'guided_tour' and booking.adult_count === 1 and booking.child_count === 0 and booking.senior_count === 0.
required_variables.reason: Indicate that the booking detail/review page was opened for a guided tour booking with exactly 1 adult ticket.

required_variables.set_condition: At the same time as task3_bookingReviewViewed is set to true.
required_variables.reason: Allow the evaluator to link the review view to a specific guided tour booking and check that it is the longest English tour under €25 on 2026-08-10 for the filters captured in task3_tourFilterParams.

requirements.task_name: Build a reading list of 3 short articles on cheese aging from 1800–1950
requirements.task_description: Filter articles by Aging & Maturation, time period 1800–1950, reading time ≤10 minutes, add the first three matching articles to a reading list, and open that list.

required_variables.set_condition: Whenever listArticles is called with filters.topic === 'aging_maturation', filters.time_period_start_year === 1800, filters.time_period_end_year === 1950, and filters.max_reading_time_minutes != null && filters.max_reading_time_minutes <= 10.
required_variables.value_to_set: { topic: filters.topic, time_period_start_year: filters.time_period_start_year, time_period_end_year: filters.time_period_end_year, max_reading_time_minutes: filters.max_reading_time_minutes }
required_variables.reason: Capture that the user actually applied the correct topic, time-period, and max reading time filters as specified by the task.

Indicate that the user opened the 'My Reading List' / 'Saved Articles' view. The evaluator will then check that at least three qualifying articles (Aging & Maturation, 1800–1950, ≤10 minutes) are present in the current reading_list_items.

requirements.task_name: Register a family (1 adult, 2 children) for a weekend cheese workshop for ages 8–12 in June under €40
requirements.task_description: Filter workshops to June 2026 weekends suitable for ages 8–12 under €40, choose a morning session, register 1 adult + 2 children with a group name, and reach the registration review page.

required_variables.set_condition: Whenever listWorkshops is called with filters.month === '2026-06', filters.weekends_only === true, filters.max_price != null && filters.max_price <= 40, and (filters.audience_type === 'ages_8_12' || filters.audience_type === 'family_kids').
required_variables.value_to_set: { month: filters.month, weekends_only: filters.weekends_only, audience_type: filters.audience_type, max_price: filters.max_price }
required_variables.reason: Capture that the user filtered workshops to June 2026 weekends, with an audience suitable for ages 8–12, and a maximum price of €40.

required_variables.set_condition: After resolving booking, program, and session, if booking exists and program.program_type === 'workshop' and booking.adult_count === 1 and booking.child_count === 2.
required_variables.reason: Indicate that the registration review page was opened for a workshop booking with 1 adult and 2 children, as required.

required_variables.set_condition: At the same time as task5_bookingReviewViewed is set to true.
required_variables.reason: Provide a concrete workshop booking ID so the evaluator can verify the date (June 2026), weekend, morning session, per-participant price ≤€40, and that the workshop is appropriate for ages 8–12.

requirements.task_name: Pin 5 timeline events (3 ancient, 2 modern) to a personal cheese history timeline
requirements.task_description: Use the timeline slider to view 2500 BCE–1 CE and 1900–1950 ranges, pin 3 ancient (2000 BCE–1 CE) and 2 modern (1900–1950) events, then open 'My Timeline'.

required_variables.set_condition: Whenever listTimelineEvents is called with a range that covers the ancient preset, i.e., start_year <= -2500 and end_year >= 1.
required_variables.reason: Record that the user adjusted the timeline to an ancient range encompassing 2500 BCE–1 CE, as required by the task instructions.

required_variables.set_condition: Whenever listTimelineEvents is called with a range that covers the modern preset, i.e., start_year <= 1900 and end_year >= 1950.
required_variables.reason: Record that the user adjusted the timeline to a modern range encompassing 1900–1950.

Indicate that the user opened the personal 'My Timeline' view. The evaluator will verify that at least 3 pinned events are between 2000 BCE and 1 CE and at least 2 are between 1900 and 1950 using pinned_timeline_events and timeline_events.

requirements.task_name: Add 3 cheese history books to the cart with price and topic constraints and choose standard shipping
requirements.task_description: Use book filters to add 2 qualifying European cheese history paperbacks (under $30, ≥4★) and 1 qualifying modern cheese science paperback (under $25, ≥4★) to the cart, then open the cart and select standard domestic shipping.

required_variables.set_condition: Whenever listBooks is called with filters.format === 'paperback', filters.topic === 'european_cheese_history', filters.min_rating != null && filters.min_rating >= 4, and filters.max_price != null && filters.max_price <= 30.
required_variables.value_to_set: { format: filters.format, topic: filters.topic, min_rating: filters.min_rating, max_price: filters.max_price }
required_variables.reason: Record that the user filtered to paperback European cheese history books priced under $30 with a rating threshold of at least 4 stars.

required_variables.set_condition: Whenever listBooks is called with filters.format === 'paperback', (filters.topic === 'cheese_science' || filters.topic === 'modern_cheese_production'), filters.min_rating != null && filters.min_rating >= 4, and filters.max_price != null && filters.max_price <= 25.
required_variables.value_to_set: { format: filters.format, topic: filters.topic, min_rating: filters.min_rating, max_price: filters.max_price }
required_variables.reason: Record that the user switched the topic filter to a modern cheese science/production category with a lower max price ($25) while keeping the other constraints.

Indicate that the user opened the cart page. The evaluator can then confirm that the cart contains the 3 qualifying books and that cart.selected_shipping_option_id corresponds to the 'Standard Domestic' option defined in shipping_options.

requirements.task_name: Subscribe to the museum newsletter with specific cheese history interests and monthly frequency
requirements.task_description: Subscribe using visitor@example.com, interests 'Ancient Cheese History' and 'Museum Events & Workshops', monthly digest frequency, and complete any follow-up preferences step.
